---
# =============================================================================
# models/index.qmd — Models listing page
# =============================================================================
title: "Models"
---

```{=html}
<div style="padding: 1rem 0;">
  <input
    class="model-search-box"
    id="model-search"
    type="text"
    placeholder="&#x1F50D; Search models by title, creator, or tag…"
    oninput="filterModels(this.value)"
  />
</div>

<div class="models-grid" id="models-grid">

  <!-- ── Model card: mather-2022-groundwater ─────────────────────────────── -->
  <a href="mather-2022-groundwater.html" class="mc-card-container" data-title="constraining the response of continental-scale groundwater flow to climate change" data-tags="groundwater thermal-hydraulic bayesian water-management python" data-creators="ben mather dietmar müller craig o'neill adam beall r.willem vervoort louis-noel moresi">
    <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ModelAtlasofTheEarth/mather-2022-groundwater/main/.website_material/graphics/fig1.png"
         alt="Groundwater flow model figure"
         onerror="this.src='https://placehold.co/600x300/D64000/white?text=M%40TE+Model';" />
    <h3>Constraining the response of continental-scale groundwater flow to climate change</h3>
    <p class="mc-card-abstract">
      Numerical models of groundwater flow play a critical role for water management scenarios under climate extremes. We developed a highly scalable numerical framework to model continental groundwater flow, capturing flow pathways between deep aquifers and the near-surface.
    </p>
    <div class="mc-card-meta">
      <span class="badge-creator">Ben Mather</span>
      <span class="badge-creator">Dietmar Müller</span>
      <span class="badge-creator">Craig O'Neill</span>
      <br/>
      <span class="badge-tag">groundwater</span>
      <span class="badge-tag">thermal-hydraulic</span>
      <span class="badge-tag">Bayesian</span>
      <span class="badge-tag">Python</span>
      <br/>
      <a class="badge-doi" href="https://doi.org/10.25914/t2mn-bk81" onclick="event.stopPropagation()">
        <span class="badge-doi-left">DOI</span>
        <span class="badge-doi-right">10.25914/t2mn-bk81</span>
      </a>
    </div>
  </a>

  <!-- ── Model card: placeholder 2 ──────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="mc-card-container" data-title="subduction zone dynamics numerical simulation" data-tags="subduction tectonics geodynamics python" data-creators="jane doe john smith">
    <img src="https://placehold.co/600x300/2c8ec7/white?text=Subduction+Model"
         alt="Subduction model placeholder" />
    <h3>Subduction zone dynamics — a numerical simulation (example placeholder)</h3>
    <p class="mc-card-abstract">
      A high-resolution 3D numerical model of subduction zone dynamics exploring the interplay between slab geometry, mantle flow, and surface topography across geological timescales.
    </p>
    <div class="mc-card-meta">
      <span class="badge-creator">Jane Doe</span>
      <span class="badge-creator">John Smith</span>
      <br/>
      <span class="badge-tag">subduction</span>
      <span class="badge-tag">tectonics</span>
      <span class="badge-tag">geodynamics</span>
      <br/>
      <span class="badge-doi">
        <span class="badge-doi-left">DOI</span>
        <span class="badge-doi-right">10.xxxxx/placeholder</span>
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ── Model card: placeholder 3 ──────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="mc-card-container" data-title="mantle convection thermal evolution earth" data-tags="mantle convection thermal evolution fortran" data-creators="alice johnson bob williams">
    <img src="https://placehold.co/600x300/555/white?text=Mantle+Convection"
         alt="Mantle convection model placeholder" />
    <h3>Mantle convection and thermal evolution of the Earth (example placeholder)</h3>
    <p class="mc-card-abstract">
      Global mantle convection model simulating 4.5 billion years of Earth thermal evolution, constrained by seismic tomography and geochemical data from ocean island basalts.
    </p>
    <div class="mc-card-meta">
      <span class="badge-creator">Alice Johnson</span>
      <span class="badge-creator">Bob Williams</span>
      <br/>
      <span class="badge-tag">mantle</span>
      <span class="badge-tag">convection</span>
      <span class="badge-tag">thermal evolution</span>
      <br/>
      <span class="badge-doi">
        <span class="badge-doi-left">DOI</span>
        <span class="badge-doi-right">10.xxxxx/placeholder</span>
      </span>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<p id="no-results" style="display:none; color:#888; font-size:16px;">No models matched your search.</p>

<script>
function filterModels(query) {
  const q = query.toLowerCase().trim();
  const cards = document.querySelectorAll('#models-grid > [data-title]');
  let visible = 0;
  cards.forEach(function(card) {
    const text = (
      (card.dataset.title || '') + ' ' +
      (card.dataset.tags  || '') + ' ' +
      (card.dataset.creators || '')
    ).toLowerCase();
    const show = !q || text.includes(q);
    card.style.display = show ? '' : 'none';
    if (show) visible++;
  });
  document.getElementById('no-results').style.display = (visible === 0) ? '' : 'none';
}
</script>
```
